movie.actors: Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite, Arliss Howard
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. Another 4 wins & 23 nominations.
movie.plot: A research team is sent to the Jurassic Park Site B island to study the dinosaurs there, while an InGen team approaches with another agenda.
movie.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
